mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.real_name, u.avatar_url FROM sys_log_article a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.article_id = #{articleId}

SELECT a.*, u.real_name, u.avatar_url FROM sys_log_article a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id
AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT a.*, u.real_name, u.avatar_url FROM sys_log_article a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_log_article (title, content, user_id, read_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_log_article SET read_count = read_count + 1 WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
